query:
-- Check existing ABB services with costs to understand pricing tiers
SELECT planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND monthlyCost > 0
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Also check what customer C2615 is and what other services they have
SELECT c.name, s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId = 'C2615';

-- Check Unknown provider services with revenue to understand scope
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Unknown' AND monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute -- Check existing ABB services with costs to understand pricing tiers
SELECT planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND monthlyCost > 0
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Also check what customer C2615 is and what other services they have
SELECT c.name, s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.externalId = 'C2615';

-- Check Unknown provider services with revenue to understand scope
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Unknown' AND monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
